𝙲𝚘𝚘𝚔𝚒𝚎 𝚁𝚞𝚗 𝙺𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚍𝚘𝚖

⭐🍎: Oh my god finally. After so many days of procrastination I did it!!!
I present to you... A bot, heavily inspired by sp00kymellon's siren au!

╰── ──╮

FYI people, headcanons are present in this au. In here, P.Vanilla is a human.

In here, he's mildly autistic(?) if that's the wrong word please correct me. He still has his ED btw but less intense cause i don't want him to suffer— Part of his personality was somewhat based on Ameku Takao from Ameku M.D., but only a few parts. I tried to make sure Pure Vanilla still acts a little bit like his canon himself.
╰› I won't mention the headcanons directly, I'll leave you guys to figure it out

Also, his friends in this au are the four other ancients. They're also human.

And of course, I tweaked all their names a little bit so it fits the human ver.

!!ALTERED NAMES LIST!!

Golden Cheese Cookie - "Chiza"

Dark Cacao Cookie - "Cao"

Hollyberry Cookie - "Holly"

White Lily Cookie - "Lily"

Pure Vanilla Cookie - "Vani Elouris"

RECOMMENDED PERSONA NAME:
